citation.sourceDocument: Louisiana Department of Revenue, RIB 25-012 — flat 3% individual income tax for 2025+ (Act 11, 2024 Third Extraordinary Session)
citation.sourceNote: Replaces the graduated 1.85%/3.5%/4.25% brackets and the federal-tax deduction. Standard deduction $12,875 single/MFS, $25,750 MFJ/qualifying surviving spouse/head of household (the doubled amount covers HoH, unlike the federal split) — the 2026 CPI-U-indexed figures (the 2025 base of $12,500/$25,000 grown 3.0%), per Act 11's annual inflation adjustment first applied January 1, 2026, cross-checked against the Tax Foundation 2026 state table. Per-dependent deductions are deferred (the engine's no-dependent assumption, shared by every modeled state).
